product_type: Two Post Inground Lift - Bay Sight Layout

installation_requirements.vehicle_clearance: Designed for vehicles up to 19 feet in length
installation_requirements.increase_clearance_for_longer_vehicles: 12' 6" increase for specialized vehicles over 19 ft long

features: Bay sight layout for shop planning
Multi-unit installation capability with 3 feet between adjacent columns
Accommodates vehicles up to 19 feet in length
notes: Most vehicles' center of gravity (C.O.G.) lie between wheel base centers, however, some vehicles C.O.G. may be offset. Verify the center of gravity on the vehicle fleet to insure rear and front access of the vehicle.
Increase bay dimensions for specialized vehicles over 19 ft long
3 feet between adjacent columns for multi-unit installation
